entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 14:35
entries.excerpt: A minister of the kingdom who is understanding is acceptable. He indeed to whom it is said, Because you have been faithful over a few things, I will set you over many things; enter into the joy of your lord (Matt. XXV).

entries.title: Commentary on Proverbs on proverbs 14:35
entries.excerpt: His wrath will fall upon the useless. He indeed about whom the same says: And cast the useless servant into the outer darkness (Ibid.)
